Punnagaye pala pala pala vena
oligalin thuliyena
neeludhae

oligalin thuliyena

un chinna thimiro
naadhaswaramey.

jeeva swaramae.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Punnagaye?

Punnagaye conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the beauty of romantic relationships.

How does Punnagaye fit into the movie 24?

The song plays a significant role in showcasing the romantic subplot between the lead characters in 24.

Who are the singers of Punnagaye?

The song is sung by Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi, whose voices complement each other beautifully.

Who composed the music for Punnagaye?

The music for Punnagaye was composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

When was Punnagaye released?

Punnagaye was released on April 11, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie 24, the song Punnagaye serves as a poignant expression of love and dreams. The lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, perfectly complemented by the soothing melodies of AR Rahman. Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi's harmonious voices create an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This romantic duet captures the essence of relationships, making it a perfect choice for special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Punnagaye from the 24 soundtrack is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi, combined with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the poetic brilliance of Vairamuthu's lyrics as they weave a tale of romance and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Punnagai, many, many, many, like the waves of the sea, oh blue.
Dreams, dreams, the dreams of the first time are fading away.
Is this the poem that God is writing?
Is the rain enough to wash away, is it enough to wash away, the song in my heart?
The rain sings with the birds and the lights, it sings with me.
Oh, the beautiful rain will come for us.
That sky is full of many colors, it won't let us down on this earth.
Now, the thorns and the thorns will speak, now the rain is a secret.
Punnagai, many, many, many, like the waves of the sea, it is flowing.
Dreams, dreams, the dreams of the first time are fading away.
Is this the poem that God is writing?
Is the rain enough to wash away, is it enough to wash away, the song in my heart?
The rain sings with the birds and the lights, it sings with me.
Oh..... the musical rain has a hundred notes of love.
Your little melody is the sound of life when you are with me.
Without forgetting, I will go wherever the rain leads me.
Punnagai, many, many, many, like the waves of the sea, oh blue.
Dreams, dreams, the dreams of the first time are fading away.
Is this the poem that God is writing?
Is the rain enough to wash away, is it enough to wash away, the song in my heart?
Oh, the beautiful rain will come for us.
That sky is full of many colors, it won't let us down on this earth.
Now, the thorns and the thorns will speak, now the rain is a secret.
